title: User Settings
Supabase Client Integration
close_reason: All subtasks completed. Created 4 data models (User, UserContact, Event, EventRecipient), 4 repositories (UserRepository, UserContactRepository, EventRepository, EventRecipientRepository), RealtimeService with broadcast subscriptions, and Koin DI module (supabaseDataModule). All using supabase-kt Postgrest and Realtime APIs.

title: Initialize Supabase client with configuration
description: Configure Supabase client in shared project with proper environment variable handling, authentication, database, and real-time services setup using supabase-kt
close_reason: Supabase client already initialized in Supabase.kt with Auth, Postgrest, and Realtime modules. Config.kt provides environment variable handling. supabaseClientModule provides Koin DI integration.

title: Create Real-time service for event subscriptions
description: Implement RealtimeService using Supabase Realtime client to subscribe to channels for receiving private and public event updates
close_reason: Created RealtimeService interface and RealtimeServiceImpl in data/RealtimeService.kt with user channel subscriptions (user:{userId}:notifications), public channel (public:events), RealtimeEventListener interface, RealtimeEventPayload model. Uses Supabase Realtime broadcast API with private channels for RLS enforcement, proper state management, and cleanup logic.

title: Set up Koin dependency injection for Supabase services
description: Configure Koin modules to inject Supabase client, authentication service, repositories, and realtime service into shared module
close_reason: Created supabaseDataModule in Koin.kt with DI for UserRepository, UserContactRepository, EventRepository, EventRecipientRepository, and RealtimeService. All repositories are singletons, RealtimeService uses CoroutineScope with SupervisorJob. Added supabaseDataModule to initKoin().

title: Create Users data model
description: Define Users data model class matching database schema with id, phone_number, display_name, device_id, fcm_token, platform, is_active, timestamps
close_reason: Created User data model in data/User.kt with all fields from spec: id, phoneNumber, displayName, deviceId, fcmToken (nullable), platform, isActive, timestamps. Includes Platform enum and convenience methods.

title: Create UserContacts data model
description: Define UserContacts data model class with id, user_id, contact_phone_number, display_name, has_app, contact_user_id, timestamps
close_reason: Created UserContact data model in data/UserContact.kt with all fields from spec: id, userId, contactPhoneNumber, displayName, hasApp, contactUserId (nullable), timestamps. Includes convenience methods for updating app status and display name.

title: Create Events data model
description: Define Events data model class with id, creator_id, severity, category, lat, lon, location_override, broadcast_type, description, is_anonymous, created_at, expires_at, deleted_at
close_reason: Created Event data model in data/Event.kt with all fields from spec: id, creatorId, severity, category, lat, lon, locationOverride (nullable), broadcastType, description, isAnonymous, createdAt, expiresAt, deletedAt (nullable). Includes Severity, Category, BroadcastType enums and convenience methods for checking event state.

title: Create EventRecipients data model
description: Define EventRecipients data model class with event_id, user_id, delivery_status, notified_at, opened_at, cleared_at, timestamps
close_reason: Created EventRecipient data model in data/EventRecipient.kt with all fields from spec: eventId, userId, deliveryStatus, notifiedAt (nullable), openedAt (nullable). Includes DeliveryStatus enum, composite PK handling, and convenience methods for updating delivery and opened status. Note: No clearedAt field as event clearing is client-side only per spec.

title: Create User repository with Supabase-kt
description: Implement UserRepository using Supabase Postgrest client with CRUD operations for users table, including authentication helper methods
close_reason: Created UserRepository interface and UserRepositoryImpl in data/UserRepository.kt with CRUD operations: create, getUserById, getUserByPhoneNumber, getUserByDeviceId, updateDisplayName, updateFcmToken, updateLastActive, deactivateUser, deleteUser. Uses supabase-kt Postgrest API with proper Result error handling.

title: Create UserContacts repository with Supabase-kt
description: Implement UserContactsRepository using Supabase Postgrest client for managing user contact lists, including matching app users
close_reason: Created UserContactRepository interface and UserContactRepositoryImpl in data/UserContactRepository.kt with CRUD operations: createContact, createContacts (batch), getContactsByUserId, getContactById, getContactByPhoneNumber, updateContactDisplayName, updateContactAppStatus, deleteContact, deleteAllContacts, syncContacts. Uses supabase-kt Postgrest API with proper Result error handling.

title: Create Events repository with Supabase-kt
description: Implement EventsRepository using Supabase Postgrest client for event CRUD operations and querying by location/broadcast_type
close_reason: Created EventRepository interface and EventRepositoryImpl in data/EventRepository.kt with operations: createEvent, getEventById, getEventsByCreator, getPublicEventsByBounds, getPublicEventsByRadius (with approx miles-to-degrees conversion), getActiveEvents, getPrivateEventsForUser, deleteEvent (soft delete), cleanupExpiredEvents. Uses supabase-kt Postgrest API with proper Result error handling and deleted_at null filtering.

title: Create EventRecipients repository with Supabase-kt
description: Implement EventRecipientsRepository using Supabase Postgrest client for tracking delivery status of private events
close_reason: Created EventRecipientRepository interface and EventRecipientRepositoryImpl in data/EventRecipientRepository.kt with operations: createRecipients (batch), getRecipientsByEvent, getRecipient, getEventsReceivedByUser, getPendingRecipients, getFailedRecipients, updateDeliveryStatus, markAsSent, markAsFailed, markAsOpened, deleteRecipient, deleteAllRecipientsForEvent. Uses supabase-kt Postgrest API with proper Result error handling. Note: Event clearing/dismissal is client-side only per spec.

Include color for selected state styling.

Device ID & User Profile Management
Create DeviceIdProvider service with platform-specific implementations
description: Create expect/actual interface for DeviceIdProvider that generates and persists a unique device ID across Android and iOS. The device ID should be generated once per device installation and persisted in secure storage.
close_reason: Implemented DeviceIdProvider with expect/actual pattern for Android and iOS. Includes SecureStorage abstraction, ContextProvider for Android, and device ID generation using platform-specific identifiers combined with UUIDs.

title: Create user profile use cases (domain layer)
description: Create use cases in the domain layer for managing user profile: UpdateDisplayNameUseCase, UpdateFcmTokenUseCase, UpdateLastActiveUseCase. These use cases encapsulate business logic and use UserRepository for data operations.
close_reason: Created user profile use cases in domain layer: UpdateDisplayNameUseCase, UpdateFcmTokenUseCase, UpdateLastActiveUseCase. Each use case encapsulates business logic and delegates to UserRepository.

title: Create UserSessionManager service
description: Create UserSessionManager to handle user session lifecycle including: getting current user, checking device binding, updating device ID on new login, updating last active timestamp. This service integrates with Supabase Auth and UserRepository.
close_reason: Created UserSessionManager service with session lifecycle management: getCurrentAuthUser(), validateDeviceBinding(), rebindToDevice(), updateLastActive(), signOut(). Also added updateDeviceId method to UserRepository for device rebinding.

title: Add new services to Koin DI module
description: Update the supabaseDataModule in Koin.kt to register: DeviceIdProvider, user profile use cases, and UserSessionManager. Ensure proper dependency injection setup.
close_reason: Updated supabaseDataModule in Koin.kt to register: SecureStorage (via expect/actual factory), user profile use cases (UpdateDisplayNameUseCase, UpdateFcmTokenUseCase, UpdateLastActiveUseCase), and UserSessionManager. Added authModule to initKoin and DeviceIdProvider initialization.

title: Database Migration & RLS Policies
